title: AICP Webhook Delivery Envelope
description: The canonical envelope shape for webhook deliveries in the AICP webhook binding.

webhook_id.description: Unique identifier for this delivery attempt. Used for idempotency/deduplication.

interaction_id.description: The interaction this event belongs to.

event_type.description: The type of event that triggered this webhook delivery.

actor_id.description: The actor that caused the state change.

payload.description: The event-specific payload. Shape depends on event_type.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the event occurrence.

evidence_hash.description: Hash of the EvidenceEvent that triggered this delivery. Must match event_hash in the evidence chain.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex digest of the raw JSON body using the registered secret.
